_repository_comment: GitHub repository to fetch PRs from (org/repo format)
_workspace_path_comment: Local path to repository clone (where Claude can read code)
_skill_paths_comment: Skill file paths for domain knowledge (optional, defaults to [])
_filter_comment: PR filter criteria - used by end_to_end.py

filter._authors_comment: Authors to filter by (null = all authors)
filter._dates_comment: Date range in days (e.g., 1 = last 1 day, 7 = last week). Set to null to disable date filtering
filter._is_merged_comment: Filter by merge status: true (merged only), false (unmerged only), null (all PRs)
filter._is_open_comment: Filter by open/closed status: true (open only), false (closed only), null (all PRs)
filter._is_draft_comment: Filter by draft status: true (drafts only), false (non-drafts only), null (all PRs)

_diff_filter_comment: Post-fetch filtering based on diff characteristics (applied before critique)

diff_filter._max_lines_changed_comment: Filter out PRs with more than X lines changed (null = no limit)
diff_filter._max_files_changed_comment: Filter out PRs with more than X files changed (null = no limit)
diff_filter._only_test_files_comment: Filter by test file status: true (only test-only PRs), false (only PRs with non-test files), null (all PRs)
